title: Usopp Chooses to Leave the Village Peacefully
description: On pages 16–17, the Syrup Village arc settles after Kuro’s defeat, focusing on Usopp’s decision, Kaya’s gratitude, and the end of the Usopp Pirates.
scene: The village chooses peace and secrecy while Usopp prepares to leave, turning his old lies into the beginning of a real journey.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you trying to say!?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's a CER- Berus, get rid of him!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Of course, I'm a brave warrior of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Run, it's the alien store- owner guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: To become a master Carpen- Ter!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: While not losing sight of our ambitions...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: swear that you will go on the road you have chosen!

summary: This part gives Syrup Village an emotional farewell: Usopp protects the village’s peace, says goodbye to his friends, and steps toward becoming a real pirate.
